channel.title: Home on Haocheng Liu
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Haocheng Liu

item.description: News # “Non-stationary Signal Analysis Tool” validated with computer software copyright registration certification No.2021SR0872462 Bachelor Thesis “Research on multi-frequency composed signal decomposition and software development” awarded some honors

Projects # \(\) Research on multi-frequency mixed signal decomposition method | Bachelor Thesis, Sep. 2020 – Jun. 2021 # Part of a state-level topic in China and supervised by Prof. Dongmei Fu, Bio-Inspired Computing and Intelligent Information Processing Lab, Beijing Proposed a signal decomposition algorithm based on variational method which is scene adaptive on non-stationary signal and has higher accuracy compared with EMD, VMD in analysis of ECG signals and bearing signals Analysed the signals and trends of corrosive atmospheric components as chlorine and sulfur around mainland China based on galvanic corrosion data collected by observation stations of State Grid Corporation of China (SGCC) Programmed a signal decomposition and feature extraction toolbox (Copyright Registration: No.

item.title: About
item.description: About # Hi, this is my personal website and is keeping updating, you can find here information regarding my recent works and research. Welcome to get connect with me. This website is hosted on GitHub and was generated by Hugo which might be the world’s fastest framework for building websites. This site has been validated by the W3C:‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎

item.title: Software & Code
item.description: Software & Code # I will upload here my codes of software and simulation… Though I am still arranging them, feel free to visit my GitHub now.
